subcodes.first_line: The Book which the Wronged One hath revealed unto them that have believed in God, the All-Protecting, the Self-Subsisting, and have turned unto His Countenance after extinction [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم لمن آمن بالله المهیمن القیوم و توجه الی الوجه بعد فناء
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @thankfulness; gratitude
